popularStory.headline: Gérard Ier de Lorraine (1030-1070)
popularStory.description: Gérard d'Alsace, né vers 1030, mort le 11 août 1070 à Remiremont, fut seigneur de Châtenois, puis duc de Lorraine de 1048 à 1070. Les textes de l'époque le désignent sous les nom de Gérard d'Alsace, G …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz於大約1020年出生在法國洛萊時，他的父親Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville40歲，母親Gisèle37歲。他和Hadwide de  Namur至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1070年4月14日在法國洛萊沃斯格斯雷米雷蒙特享年51歲，埋葬在法國洛萊沃斯格斯雷米雷蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz于大约1020年出生在法国洛萊时，他的父亲Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville40岁，母亲Gisèle37岁。他和Hadwide de  Namur至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1070年4月14日在法国洛萊沃斯格斯雷米雷蒙特享年51岁，埋葬在法国洛萊沃斯格斯雷米雷蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Gérard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz was born about 1020, in Lorraine, France, his father, Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville, was 40 and his mother, Gisèle, was 37. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Hadwide de  Namur. He died on 14 April 1070, in Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz est né environ 1020, à Lorraine, France, son père, Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Gisèle, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Hadwide de  Namur. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1070, à Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz um 1020 in Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville 40 und seine Mutter Gisèle 37. Er hatte mit Hadwide de  Namur mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. April 1070 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Remiremont, Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Remiremont, Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz è nato il circa 1020 nel Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Gisèle, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Hadwide de  Namur. Morì il 14 aprile 1070, nel Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metzが約1020年にフランスロレィヌで生まれた時，父Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonvilleは40歳，母Gisèleは37歳であった。彼はHadwide de  Namurとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1070年4月14日にフランスロレィヌボスジェズレミーレモントで51歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌボスジェズレミーレモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz(이)가 대략 1020년 프랑스 로레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisèle(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Hadwide de  Namur(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1070년 4월 14일 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스 렘이어몽에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스 렘이어몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Lorraine, França, seu pai, Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Hadwide de  Namur. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1070, em Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz родился около 1020 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisèle, 37. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Hadwide de  Namur. Он умер 14 апреля 1070 г. в местности ремиремонт, фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности ремиремонт, фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz nació aproximadamente 1020, en Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Gérard IV de Metz de Bouzonville, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Gisèle, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Hadwide de  Namur. Murió el 14 de abril de 1070, en Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Remiremont, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia.
